name: Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime
description: The product does not sufficiently track and release allocated memory after it has been used, causing memory leaks that make memory unavailable for reallocation and eventually lead to resource exhaustion and denial of service.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM or STORAGE node performs memory allocation (malloc, new, buffer creation) along a code path where no corresponding deallocation occurs before the reference is lost, especially on error paths or when a CONTROL node branches without releasing resources
